mapper.select: SELECT e.ENV_ID, e.DEVICE_ID, e.METRIC_CODE, e.VALUE, e.COLLECTED_AT FROM P_ENVIRONMENT_T e INNER JOIN ( SELECT DEVICE_ID, METRIC_CODE, MAX(COLLECTED_AT) AS MAX_AT FROM P_ENVIRONMENT_T WHERE DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId} GROUP BY DEVICE_ID, METRIC_CODE ) latest ON e.DEVICE_ID = latest.DEVICE_ID AND e.METRIC_CODE = latest.METRIC_CODE AND e.COLLECTED_AT = latest.MAX_AT WHERE e.DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId}
